title: trifolium stellatum subvar. stramineum
intro: Trifolium stellatum subvar. stramineum, also known as the pale star clover, is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Trifolium stellatum plant, which is a perennial herb belonging to the legume family. The pale star clover has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the pale star clover is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
